palette.rationale: Equatorial dusk teak-and-coral. Lifted verbatim from design/compositions/sigils.jsx SHOWS.survivor; user-approved.

palette_overrides_frontmatter.note: Calling skill (phase 5) writes the new palette back to content/shows/survivor.md after this brander run returns.

primary_vs_default_paper_0.context: ensures show primary works in cards on the global show index where tokens.json paper.0 applies

palette_siblings_check.note: Survivor primary #D55E36 (warm clay/coral) sits visually between Top Chef's umber and Drag Race's hot pink — all three distinguishable at thumbnail scale.

grammar.layout: Adopts SurvivorMiniFacade layout from design/compositions/screens.jsx — pediment occupies top 270px (translate +40, triangle apex y=18 to base y=230), frieze band y=290 to y=350 (woven chevrons), five palm columns at x={120,320,520,720,920} extending y=420 to y=716, three-line ground at y={720,740,760}, ornament dispersal at y=770 in three positions.
grammar.column_variation: Columns 1 and 5 mirror the sigil's exact column-3 frond geometry; columns 2 and 4 use a slightly tightened mirror with coconuts swapped left/right for visual rhythm; center column 3 is the verbatim sigil geometry. All five share the same trunk shape and frond-ray count (5).

ornaments.ornament-1.svg: woven-rope-knot (interlaced chevrons from the frieze, knotted at center with coral seed)
ornaments.ornament-2.svg: palm-frond (single radial frond derived from column fronds, coral fruit at base)

sigil_derivation: viewBox-scaled (0 0 80 -> 0 0 320). Paths and stroke widths multiplied by 4x from SurvivorSigil source. Identical geometry, no redrawing.
